Uses of Interface
org.apache.arrow.adbc.core.BulkIngestBuilder

Packages that use BulkIngestBuilder
Package
Description
org.apache.arrow.adbc.core
ADBC (Arrow Database Connectivity) is an API standard for Arrow-based database access.

  • Uses of BulkIngestBuilder in org.apache.arrow.adbc.core

    Methods in org.apache.arrow.adbc.core that return BulkIngestBuilder
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    BulkIngestBuilder
    BulkIngestBuilder.appendMode()
    Append to the target table; fail if not found.
    BulkIngestBuilder
    BulkIngestBuilder.bind(ArrowReader stream)
    Ingest data from the given reader.
    BulkIngestBuilder
    BulkIngestBuilder.bind(VectorSchemaRoot root)
    Ingest data from the given root.
    default BulkIngestBuilder
    AdbcConnection.bulkIngest()
    Bulk ingest Arrow data into a table, using a fluent builder-style API.
    BulkIngestBuilder
    BulkIngestBuilder.createAppendMode()
    Create the target table if necessary, append if already exists.
    BulkIngestBuilder
    BulkIngestBuilder.createMode()
    Create the target table; fail if already exists.
    BulkIngestBuilder
    BulkIngestBuilder.mode(BulkIngestMode mode)
    How to handle an already-existing/non-existent target table.
    BulkIngestBuilder
    BulkIngestBuilder.option(IngestOption option)
    Set an arbitrary ingest option.
    <T> BulkIngestBuilder
    BulkIngestBuilder.option(TypedKey<T> key, T value)
    Set a statement option before ingest.
    BulkIngestBuilder
    BulkIngestBuilder.replaceMode()
    Drop (if exists) and create the target table.
    BulkIngestBuilder
    BulkIngestBuilder.targetCatalog(String catalog)
    Ingest into a table in the given catalog.
    BulkIngestBuilder
    BulkIngestBuilder.targetSchema(String schema)
    Ingest into a table in the given schema.
    BulkIngestBuilder
    BulkIngestBuilder.targetTable(String table)
    Ingest into a table with the given name (required).
    default BulkIngestBuilder
    BulkIngestBuilder.temporary()
    Ingest into a temporary table.
    BulkIngestBuilder
    BulkIngestBuilder.temporary(boolean isTemporary)
    Whether to ingest into a temporary table or not.
